DownloadPage.title: DownloadPage
DownloadPage.discription: Ezblock Studio applies to iPad, Android OS or iOS. You can store codes in cloud account for code calling across platform.

es.discription_p1: Ezblock Studio applies to iPad, Android OS or iOS.
es.discription_p2: You can store codes in cloud account for code calling across platform.

io.discription_p1: Based on the Raspbian-stretch-lite released on 2019-04-10.
io.discription_p2: Raspberry Pi 4 is not supported for the time being.
